headline: Citi Raises Morgan Stanley (MS) Price Target Following Coverage Transfer
summary: With a 5-year average dividend growth rate of 23.36%, Morgan Stanley (NYSE:MS) is included among the 14 Best Dividend Stocks to Buy for Steady Growth. On May 8, Citi raised its price recommendation on Morgan Stanley (NYSE:MS) to $194 from $170. It reiterated a Neutral rating on the stock. The firm updated targets across the banking sector […]

headline: 12 Investment Must Reads for This Week (May 12, 2026)
summary: Hedge funds are upping their bets on soyabean oil, which is used to produce biodiesel, amid the global oil market crunch. Morningstar unveiled its latest batch of medalist ratings for evergreen funds. These are among the investment must reads for financial advisors this week.

headline: Morgan Stanley (NYSE:MS) Scores Perfect Technical Rating as Breakout Setup Forms

headline: Morgan Stanley revisits Walmart stock price target pre-earnings
summary: There's a version of Walmart most people still picture. Fluorescent lights, crowded aisles, maybe a cart with a wobbly wheel. That version still exists. But the company Wall Street is paying 43 times forward earnings for? That's a different beast entirely.As of 2026, Walmart is a 63-year-old ...
